errors.d1-eq-set-semantics: sameRoomSet must compare members, not cardinality
errors.b4-swap-at-same-cardinality-notifies: membership swap at unchanged cardinality must notify: expected 1, got 0
errors.b7-monitor-sees-swap: a swap at unchanged cardinality must alert the entering gallery: expected ["a","b"], got ["a"]
errors.b8-realert-on-reentry: a gallery that recovers and re-enters is alerted again: expected ["west","west"], got ["west"]
